---
title: 'Guides'
description: "In-depth guides for data workflows, ML pipelines, performance optimization, and platform operations with Xorq"
---

In-depth guides for common workflows. Each guide covers a specific topic end-to-end with production patterns, error handling, and best practices.

## Explore the guides

::: {.docs-grid}
::: {.doc-card}
<i class="bi bi-file-earmark-bar-graph"></i>

[**Data workflows**](data_workflows/read_write_production_data.qmd)

Read and write production data, validate quality, transform with custom UDFs, and build feature pipelines
:::

::: {.doc-card}
<i class="bi bi-diagram-3"></i>

[**ML workflows**](ml_workflows/integrate_sklearn_pipelines.qmd)

Integrate scikit-learn pipelines, train models at scale, and evaluate performance
:::

::: {.doc-card}
<i class="bi bi-speedometer2"></i>

[**Performance workflows**](performance_workflows/optimize_pipeline_performance.qmd)

Optimize pipeline performance, tune model serving, and switch backends dynamically
:::

::: {.doc-card}
<i class="bi bi-cloud"></i>

[**Platform workflows**](platform_workflows/manage_compute_catalog.qmd)

Manage the compute catalog, set up CI/CD, and monitor production deployments
:::
:::
